healthcheck_config.description: Validates Microsoft OAuth token via Graph /me endpoint

metadata.summary: Microsoft Outlook email, calendar, and contacts automation via the Microsoft Graph API.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to the Azure Portal -> Microsoft Entra ID -> App registrations.
2. Click 'New registration', name your app, and set redirect URI to http://localhost.
3. Under 'Certificates & secrets', create a new client secret and copy it.
4. Under 'API permissions', add Microsoft Graph delegated permissions: User.Read, Mail.Read, Mail.Send, Calendars.Read, Contacts.Read.
5. Copy the Application (client) ID from the Overview page.
6. In Personas, click Authorize with Microsoft.
7. Complete consent in your browser and return to Personas.
